Our Products

Three apps. Every employer covered.

Whether you're a Business Owner, HR Professional, Labour Consultant, or Household Employer — there's an iNRECO app built for you.

iNRECO
Your pocket labour consultant

AI-powered South African labour law assistant for HR professionals, employers and labour consultants. CCMA procedures, disciplinary matters, IR compliance — answered instantly.

  • AI-powered IR and CCMA guidance
  • Disciplinary hearing support
  • SA labour legislation library
  • CARA — your AI labour consultant
  • Built for South African law

By iNRECO

DomestiSure
Your Household. Our Expertise.

Household employer compliance made effortless. Payslips, contracts, UIF declarations, leave tracking — everything a domestic worker employer needs to stay legal.

  • BCEA-compliant payslips
  • Employment contracts
  • UIF monthly declarations
  • Leave tracker
  • Free forever plan

VERDIQT
Empowering Consultants. Protecting Employers.

Professional disciplinary hearing assistant for chairpersons and HR professionals. AI-drafted CCMA-format outcomes, charge builder, hearing flow and full case management.

  • AI-drafted hearing outcomes
  • CCMA-format documents
  • Charge builder
  • Full case management
  • Works offline

Powered by iNRECO

Who Builds These Apps

Built by a practitioner.
Not a software company.

iNRECO apps are built by Casper Badenhorst — a South African labour law and IR practitioner with over two decades of hands-on experience in disciplinary hearings, CCMA matters and workplace compliance. Every feature, every document, every legal reference comes from real-world practice.

These apps exist because South African employers consistently face the same compliance challenges. iNRECO makes expert-level compliance affordable and accessible to everyone.

Privacy Policy

Last updated: May 2026


1. Who we are
iNRECO is operated by Inreco Consulting, South Africa. Contact: info@inreco.co.za


2. What we collect
When you sign up for any iNRECO app, we collect your name, email address and any information you enter into the app. For newsletter signups, we collect only your email address.


3. How we use your information
We use your information to provide the app service, send important updates, and improve our products. We never sell your personal information to third parties.


4. POPIA compliance
We process personal information in accordance with the Protection of Personal Information Act 4 of 2013 (POPIA). You have the right to access, correct or delete your personal information at any time by contacting info@inreco.co.za.


5. Data security
Your data is stored securely using industry-standard encryption. We use Supabase for data storage, which is SOC 2 compliant.


6. Cookies
Our apps use essential cookies only for authentication. We do not use tracking or advertising cookies.


7. Contact
For any privacy concerns: info@inreco.co.za or WhatsApp +27 84 402 7029

Terms of Use

Last updated: May 2026


1. Acceptance
By using any iNRECO app, you agree to these terms. If you do not agree, please do not use our apps.


2. Disclaimer
iNRECO apps provide general compliance guidance and document templates based on South African law. They do not constitute legal advice. For complex matters, consult a qualified labour law practitioner. Inreco Consulting accepts no liability for decisions made based on app-generated content.


3. Document disclaimer
All documents generated by iNRECO apps (payslips, contracts, declarations) are templates based on current South African legislation. You are responsible for verifying their accuracy for your specific circumstances.


4. Subscriptions and payments
Subscription fees are billed monthly. You may cancel at any time. Refunds are not provided for partial months. Pricing is in South African Rand and includes VAT where applicable.


5. Intellectual property
All iNRECO app content, designs and code are the property of Inreco Consulting. You may not copy, reproduce or distribute any part of our apps without written permission.


6. Governing law
These terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of South Africa.


7. Contact
info@inreco.co.za · WhatsApp +27 84 402 7029
